name: Long Fei
research_note: Single primary source (kingshot-data). kingshotwiki 404 pattern for Gen 5. | 9x3x3 update: 2nd source added from lootbar.gg/blog/en/kingshot-gen-5-heroes-guide.html — kingshot-data + lootbar.gg Gen 5/6 guide convergence confirmed on mechanics and max values (tier-by-tier scaling remains kingshot-data single-source for some fields).

base_stats.notable: Highest base Health of any documented hero (73926). With Immortal's Flask +14985, raw HP pool exceeds 88,900.

conquest.name: Ambrosia
conquest.description: Long Fei becomes one with the battlefield upon drinking the signature ambrosia, gaining Attack Speed and Immunity to control effects for 4 seconds.

conquest.name: Above and Beyond
conquest.description: Damage taken by Long Fei is reduced when his Health is below 50%.

conquest.name: Mountain Mover
conquest.description: Long Fei gains Attack when his Health is below 50%.

expedition.name: Mighty Paragon
expedition.description: Chance of reducing damage taken by 50% for all squads.

expedition.name: Art of War
expedition.description: All squads have a 25% chance of dealing increased damage when attacking.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Strong Brew
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Extends Ambrosia by 1.5 seconds and restores Health based on damage dealt. Unlocked only when Immortal's Flask is equipped.

exclusive_gear_skills.name: Strategic Strike
exclusive_gear_skills.description: Increases the Attack of defender troops. Unlocked only when Immortal's Flask is equipped.

order: Mighty Paragon (Expedition damage reduction proc) first
Then Art of War (25% proc for 200% damage)

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard infantry archetype at legendary tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Long Fei's dual <50% HP triggers (Above and Beyond + Mountain Mover) plus Ambrosia's lifesteal (via Strong Brew) make him a comeback hero. Pair with Hilde for heals and any rally lead (Amadeus/Vivian) for offensive support.
best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: heroes.js f2p=false. Single access via Hero Roulette rotation.

rally.reasoning: Usable rally thanks to Attack Speed burst.

garrison.reasoning: Highest HP + damage reduction + control immunity = top garrison tank.

bear_hunt.reasoning: Strong bear hunt sustain via Ambrosia and lifesteal.

lore_background.title: The Ancient Way Practitioner
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Classical Chinese martial-arts warrior. Skill flavor text explicitly references "the ancient way", "war wisdom" (Sun Tzu quote: "All warfare is based on deception"), and his signature "Ambrosia" potion granting attack speed and control immunity. His exclusive gear is named "Immortal's Flask". Together these suggest a Taoist martial-master archetype — ageless, patient, scholarly.
lore_background.source_note: No narrative backstory published. See thrud lore_status for search scope.
lore_background.source: derived from skill flavor text (kingshotdata.com, kingshotguide.org)

deep_analysis: Long Fei is the ultimate survival tank of Gen 5 — a Legendary Infantry hero with the highest base Health of any documented hero (73926) and a kit built around comeback mechanics. His Conquest tree: Ambrosia grants +120% Attack Speed and control immunity for 4 seconds, Above and Beyond reduces damage taken by up to 60% when his Health drops below 50%, and Mountain Mover grants up to +48% Attack under the same condition — the dual low-HP triggers make him the most dangerous when he's nearly dead. His Expedition tree buffs the whole army: Mighty Paragon has up to 50% chance to halve squad damage taken, Celestial Sustenance adds +25% squad Defense, and Art of War gives squads a 25% chance for up to +200% damage on attack. His exclusive gear Immortal's Flask adds +765 Attack, +999 Defense, +14985 Health (new record), +111% Lethality, +111% Health, and unlocks Strong Brew (extends Ambrosia by 1.5 seconds and heals him for up to 15% of damage dealt) plus Strategic Strike (+15% defender troops' Attack). Tier: S Garrison, A Rally, A Bear Hunt. Premium-gated via Hero Roulette. Lore not available — inferred from his kit as an immortal monk or warrior archetype drinking ambrosia and wielding an Immortal's Flask.
